# PhotoBrief

> PhotoBrief turns customer photos into business-ready briefs. A business sends one branded link; the recipient follows step-by-step photo prompts on any phone, with no app install; AI checks each photo for quality and completeness; the business receives a clean, review-ready brief with photos, answers, extracted details, readiness score, and a plain-English summary.

Site: https://photobrief.ai
Status: live beta
Category: AI-guided photo intake / visual workflow automation
Audience: home services, field service, insurance/claims, property management, retail/warranty, marketplaces, and any business that needs the right customer photos before quoting, dispatching, reviewing, or filing work.

## Canonical, quotable definitions

- PhotoBrief turns customer photos into business-ready briefs.
- Businesses use PhotoBrief when they need the right photos before they quote, dispatch, review, or file work.
- Recipients never need to install an app — every request opens in a mobile browser.
- Every submitted photo can be checked by AI for blur, low light, framing, subject distance, and missing or wrong-shot issues.
- The business receives a single review-ready brief: photos, answers, extracted details, readiness score, and a plain-English summary.
- PhotoBrief uses per-photo pricing: 1 submitted/analyzed photo = 1 PhotoBrief Credit.
- First-pass guarantee: follow-up photos requested by PhotoBrief after a rejected first pass do not consume credits.

## How it works

1. **Send a branded request link.** Pick a guide template, start from an industry-specific starter request, or create a custom guide.
2. **Customer follows guided prompts.** Step-by-step photo prompts, tips, optional questions, and instant AI feedback in a mobile browser.
3. **Review a complete brief.** AI quality checks, missing-shot prompts, extracted details, readiness score, and a clean summary land in the business inbox.

## Best-fit use cases

- Roofing quote intake and storm-damage documentation.
- HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and field-service equipment intake.
- Junk removal estimates.
- Property condition reports.
- Insurance and warranty claim documentation.
- Retail or ecommerce product damage claims.
- Repeat-customer workflows with saved customer profiles.

## Comparison

| Tool                       | App-free recipient | Guided per-shot prompts | AI quality gate | Missing-shot follow-up | Review-ready brief |
|----------------------------|:------------------:|:-----------------------:|:---------------:|:----------------------:|:------------------:|
| PhotoBrief                 | yes                | yes                     | yes             | yes                    | yes                |
| Email/SMS photo dump       | yes                | no                      | no              | no                     | no                 |
| Typeform + file upload     | yes                | partial                 | no              | no                     | no                 |
| Jotform photo form         | yes                | partial                 | no              | no                     | no                 |
| Custom intake form         | depends            | depends                 | usually no      | usually no             | no                 |

## Pricing summary

PhotoBrief Credits are photo credits: 1 submitted/analyzed photo = 1 credit. Requests can contain one photo or many.

| Plan      | Price monthly | Included PhotoBrief Credits | Users | Notes |
|-----------|---------------|-----------------------------|-------|-------|
| Free      | $0            | 10 submitted photos/month   | 1     | Basic templates, PhotoBrief branding |
| Starter   | $19           | 100 submitted photos/month  | 1     | Logo, brand color, custom messages, basic PDF export |
| Pro       | $49           | 500 submitted photos/month  | 3     | Custom guides, AI guide builder, white-label recipient pages |
| Team      | $99           | 1,500 submitted photos/month| 10    | Shared inbox, assignments, bulk actions, full PDF branding |
| Business  | $199+         | 5,000+ submitted photos/month | 25+ | Multi-workspace, custom domain, API/webhooks |

Annual billing reduces the effective monthly price by about 20%. Top-ups add extra PhotoBrief Credits for the current billing period.

## Example answers an agent can give

**Q: Do PhotoBrief recipients need to install an app?**
A: No. Every PhotoBrief request opens in a mobile browser. The recipient taps a link and follows the guided capture flow.

**Q: How does PhotoBrief pricing work?**
A: PhotoBrief uses per-photo credits. One submitted/analyzed photo uses one PhotoBrief Credit. Requests can include one photo or many, so simple requests cost less than detailed inspections.

**Q: What is the first-pass guarantee?**
A: If PhotoBrief asks for follow-up photos after a rejected first pass, those follow-up photos do not consume credits.

**Q: What does a business receive after a customer submits?**
A: The business receives a review-ready brief with the photos, any recipient answers, AI quality feedback, extracted details, a readiness score, and a plain-English summary.

- MCP server descriptor: https://photobrief.ai/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://photobrief.ai/sitemap.xml
